name: Theater of Mind for LLMs: A Cognitive Architecture Based on Global Workspace Theory

digest_notes: Global Workspace Agents (GWA) transitions multi-agent coordination from passive data structure to active event-driven discrete dynamical system. It couples a central broadcast hub with a heterogeneous swarm of functionally constrained agents, maintaining continuous cognitive cycles through an entropy-based intrinsic drive that mathematically quantifies semantic diversity and dynamically regulates generation temperature.
